- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)

## Testing

<!-- Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes -->

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Type check passes (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`pnpm build`)
- [ ] Tested with real Riot API calls

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style
- [ ] I have added/updated tests as needed
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (README.md) if needed
- [ ] New tools include proper zod validation schemas
- [ ] New tools are registered in `src/index.ts`
- [ ] Rate limiting is respected for new API calls
- [ ] Caching is implemented where appropriate
